description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with vertical planks and a slightly weathered appearance, featuring a light natural wood grain texture. The top surface is flat and appears to be made from the same wood as the sides, with a faint circular marking or emblem visible. One side of the barrel displays a black crossbones symbol, suggesting it may be used for storage or as a decorative object in themed urban environments. The wood is bordered at the top by a thin, metallic-looking rim, possibly for structural reinforcement. The surface shows some shadowing and subtle wear, indicating outdoor or frequent use. There are no visible handles or openings, and the barrel appears to be closed at the top.
description: A cylindrical wooden barrel with vertical planks, a flat top, and a faint crossbones marking on one side. The surface is weathered and reinforced with a thin metallic rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood grain, vertical planks, and partial shadow with a hint of the crossbones marking on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the crossbones marking fully visible on the left side of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain vertical wooden planks and no visible markings or symbols.
description_view_3: Side view with only the wood grain and planks visible, no markings or symbols.
